fallback_contact.name: Jeff Herlick

fallback_contact.rationale: Bonafide was founded in 1995 by Ralph Herlick. Jeff Herlick has been with the company 20+ years, started as a general labourer and worked up — likely runs it now. George Trudeau also has experience there with construction PM, contract mgmt, cost analysis (could be the estimating-side contact). Office: 225 Gunn Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2C 2Z2. Phone: 204-661-0117. Specializes in commercial renovations — solid fit for paint.
